seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Coogee and South Golden Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Coogee vs South Golden Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Coogee and South Golden Beach.
heading: South Coogee vs South Golden Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Coogee, New South Wales and South Golden Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Golden Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to South Coogee (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Coogee or South Golden Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Coogee has a flood risk score of 37/100, while South Golden Beach scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Coogee scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. South Golden Beach scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Coogee or South Golden Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Golden Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
